name: community namespacing: a rule already named "acme/foo" inside _community/acme/ stays "acme/foo" (not "acme/acme/foo")
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"id":"acme/foo"' out.json 1>&2 && ! grep -E '"id":"acme/acme/foo"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: acme-src
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: https://acme.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: acme/foo, name: foo, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/_community/acme/x.yaml
